title: Install and fit out components
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install and fit out components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare

pcs.text: Identify and confirm work orders and job specifications 1.2 Select tools, equipment and materials, checking for quality and safe operation according to job requirements1.3 Access assembly and installation information from manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm work orders and job specifications 1.2 Select tools, equipment and materials, checking for quality and safe operation according to job requirements1.3 Access assembly and installation information from manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm work orders and job specifications 1.2 Select tools, equipment and materials, checking for quality and safe operation according to job requirements1.3 Access assembly and installation information from manufacturer specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and prepare

elements.title: Install components

pcs.text: Identify, select and match parts and components, according to work order and job specifications3.2 Position, secure and tension parts and components according to job specifications3.3 Inspect installed components and sub-assemblies, checking for quality and fit according to job specifications and workplace procedures

elements.title: Route service lines

pcs.text: Identify and locate service lines according to job requirements4.2 Route, tie and clip service lines according to job specifications4.3 Inspect and test installed service lines according to workplace procedures and job specifications

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Collect unused materials and store or dispose of in line with workplace procedures5.2 Clean and maintain work area, checking and storing tools and equipment according to workplace procedures5.3 Identify, tag and report faulty equipment 5.4 Complete work sheets and production records
